title: Emerald Armor
description: Adds Emerald Armor to Minecraft 1.21.10 and 1.21.11!
body:
resource pack adds emerald armor to minecraft 1.21.10 and 1.21.11!

You can craft the armor like any other armor but with emeralds.

This pack is made for 1.21.10 and 1.21.11 and will not work with any version below.

have fun with this custom emerald armor!
